case_title: ARCADIA PARTNER, LLC VS. ADAMA WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: FEE (TRANSACTION ID # 200039684) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCADIA PARTNER, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200039684) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCADIA PARTNER, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ADAMA DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-23-2022

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200042563), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCADIA PARTNER, LLC SERVED OCT-28-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-29-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ADAMA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210005237) AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ADAMA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCADIA PARTNER, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ADAMA $3,818.93 PRINCIPAL, $1,571.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,389.93, SEE SCANNED DOC
